parties.name: LIU, KELLY JIN 330 28TH STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94131

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelly Liu in Propria Persona.

Ms. Liu stated that the original marriage license was provided to Los Angeles County, that she received a letter on January 18, 2017 stating Los Angeles was not going to record the license because of an adjustment, that they considered it an adjustment because the Officiant had written 2006, crossed it over and put in a 1 without initialing it, and that she was married in 2016. In addition, Ms. Liu stated that the letter indicated that she had one year from the date of marriage to provide additional documents/information, that she did not act in time and that she was told by Los Angeles that she now had to file in the County in which she resides. The Court informed Ms. Liu to file copies all correspondence she had with Los Angeles County as a supplement to the petition. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is taken under submission subject to receiving said documents.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
